revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''urn:mrn:iala:dic:0901109e

Remote learning is where the student and the instructor are not physically together. This may occur either in a synchronous or asynchronous manner, using online or offline training approaches (e.g. distance learning, e-learning, self-study or a blended delivery).

Source: IALA Guideline G1014 Accreditation of VTS training organizations and approval to deliver IALA VTS model courses
